message: 🌱 Add serverless-workflow: Authentication are not referenceable mission (#710)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "serverless-workflow-904-authentication-are-not-referenceable",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "serverless-workflow: Authentication are not referenceable",
+    "description": "Authentication are not referenceable. Requested by 2+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current serverless-workflow deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your serverless-workflow version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
helm list -n serverless-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working serverless-workflow installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review serverless-workflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant serverless-workflow configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get configmap -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=serverless-workflow
```
**What seems off**:

Authentication are not referenceable

**What you expected to be**:

Authentications defined at top level should be referenceable

After discussing the issue with , and well aware than the reference system previously in place was"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Authentication are not referenceable",
+        "description": "- Fixes #904 
- Partially addresses #866
- Changes  the way authentication policies can be referenced
- Changes the way authentication policies can use secret
- Adds a new `secrets` runtime expression argument
```yaml
use:
  authentications:
    basicTest:
      basic:
        username: test
        password: test
do:
  - getPetById:
      call: openapi
      with:
        operationId: getPetById
        parameters:
          id: 69
        authentication: 
          use: basicTest
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get events -n serverless-workflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Authentication are not referenceable" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Fixes #904 
- Partially addresses #866
- Changes  the way authentication policies can be referenced
- Changes the way authentication policies can use secret
- Adds a new `secrets` runtime expression argument",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "use:
  authentications:
    basicTest:
      basic:
        username: test
        password: test
do:
  - getPetById:
      call: openapi
      with:
        operationId: getPetById
        parameters:
          id: 69
        authentication: 
          use: basicTest",
+        "document: {}
use:
  secrets:
    - foo
  configure:
    bar: 1
do:
  - task1:
       set:
         size: ${ $configuration.size }",
+        "document: {}
use:
  secrets:
    - foo
  constants:
    bar: 1
do:
  - task1:
       set:
         size: ${ $constants.size }
         shape: ${ $secrets.foo }"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "serverless-workflow",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
